steps.title: Confirm the pseudonym claim
steps.content: The first sentence says Thomson's pseudonym did more than hide his authorship. The next sentence strengthens that idea by explaining that the name was a deliberate rhetorical strategy.

steps.title: Reject wrong transitions
steps.content: Choice B and Choice D signal contrast, but the second sentence supports the first. Choice C adds another point without showing the confirmation and emphasis needed here. The answer is A.
